# a_b_testing Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-10

## Active Technologies

- Python 3.11+ + numpy, scipy, pandas (core engine); plotly (all visualizations); streamlit (interactive app); jupyter/nbconvert (case study) (001-ab-test-toolkit)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

cd src && pytest && ruff check .

## Code Style

Python 3.11+: Follow standard conventions
